title: Happily Ever Laughter: The Darcy & Jer Story
original_title: Happily Ever Laughter: The Darcy & Jer Story
overview: A vibrant documentary spotlighting married comedians Darcy and Jer on their groundbreaking No Refunds comedy tour. Explore their dynamic marriage and rise to fame, amassing 7 million social media followers. Packed with humor and heart, this film captures their journey as they take the stage for their debut stand-up tour as a duo, blending love and laughter like never before.
